query:
SELECT 
  transaction_type,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(CAST(total_amount_chf AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_chf,
  SUM(CAST(fees AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_fees
FROM transactions 
WHERE portfolio_id = 90001
GROUP BY transaction_type
ORDER BY transaction_type;
